arts.ttl: Scotland's Nations League playoff opponents revealed as crucial World Cup seeding hinges on two results
arts.sum: The Scots left it late to leapfrog the hosts and avoid immediate relegation from the top tier of the Nations League

arts.ttl: Robertson nets late goal as Scotland stun Poland
arts.sum: A last-gasp goal by Andy Robertson gave Scotland a 2-1 away win over Poland in a pulsating Nations League Group A1 clash on Monday, a result that saw the Scots enter a relegation playoff while the Poles are relegated to the second-tier League B.

arts.ttl: Andy Robertson’s late header in Poland gifts Scotland Nations League lifeline
arts.sum: Scotland had contributed far too much to the Nations League to finish bottom of Group A1. That was the harsh reality until Andy Robertson’s glorious stoppage-time header, which secured a famous win over Poland. Steve Clarke’s team live on, courtesy of a playoff berth. When John McGinn sent Scotland ahead, thoughts were of another outcome. Had the result gone their way between Croatia and Portugal, it was conceivable Clarke’s men could finish second. Ultimately that other tie was immaterial but this one was not. Scotland and their support celebrated in epic style courtesy of Robertson’s intervention, which instead sends Poland into League B. This felt poetic, at the venue for the Liverpool full-back’s Scotland debut and, on this occasion, the earning of his 80th cap. It was the latest triumph for Clarke’s management. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Andy Robertson marks 80th Scotland cap with stoppage-time winner in Poland
arts.sum: A 2-1 victory in Warsaw sent Scotland above Poland into third place in section A1 and set up a two-legged play-off in March.

arts.ttl: Andy Robertson marks 80th Scotland cap with stoppage-time winner in Poland
arts.sum: A 2-1 victory in Warsaw sent Scotland above Poland into third place in section A1 and set up a two-legged play-off in March.

arts.ttl: Andy Robertson grabs Scotland a Nations League playoff blockbuster after a Warsaw wonder – 5 talking points
arts.sum: The Scots blazed ahead and finished with a bang as we stayed alive

arts.ttl: Robertson's late winner earns Scotland a Nations League lifeline
arts.sum: Captain Andy Robertson was Scotland's hero with a stoppage-time winner to snatch a 2-1 victory over Poland which secured them a Nations League relegation lifeline.

arts.ttl: Scotland 2-1 Poland: Last-gasp Andy Robertson header earns Nations League relegation lifeline
arts.sum: The skipper headed home in the 93rd minute to send his country above Poland

arts.ttl: Watch Poland vs Scotland live stream for FREE as Nations League fate to be decided
arts.sum: The Croats host group winners Portugal and for Steve Clarke's side to qualify for the Nations League quarter-finals, Scotland would need a two-goal win in either game, or to overtake them on goals scored, or away goals scored. Scotland started the month among the third seeds for the World Cup qualifying draw and victory would likely take them into pot two, or even pot one.
